positive_catalysts.summary: Permian Resources Corporation is highlighted as one of the best natural gas and oil dividend stocks to buy now.

sar_complement: The news reinforces the SAR signal by highlighting Permian Resources' strong positioning in the dividend and growth sectors of the oil and gas market. There are no negative catalysts identified in the articles, suggesting a favorable outlook.
